text: This chapter is a remedial law that shall be liberally construed to promote the public health, safety, and welfare.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.002 — Construction

This chapter is a remedial law that shall be liberally construed to promote the public health, safety, and welfare.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter is a remedial law that shall be liberally construed to promote the public health, safety, and welfare.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
